name: witcherscript-language-features
description: Minimal WitcherScript diagnostics, navigation, and hover support.

witcherscript.server.path.description: Optional path to the witcherscript-lsp executable. If empty, the extension uses the bundled server binary.

witcherscript.gameDirectory.description: Absolute path to The Witcher 3 game directory (e.g. C:\games\The Witcher 3 Wild Hunt GOTY). Used by the language server to locate base game scripts.

witcherscript.logLevel.description: Log verbosity for the WitcherScript language server. Messages appear in the WitcherScript output channel.

witcherscript.formatter.lineLimit.description: Maximum line length the formatter will target before wrapping.

witcherscript.formatter.compactColon.description: When enabled, the formatter omits spaces around the colon in type annotations (e.g. `var x:int` instead of `var x : int`).
